title: AP Accountant-General Audit of Contracts
text_english: All contracts entered into by the Government shall be subject to EXAMINATION by the Accountant-General as part of his audit functions. The Accountant-General shall REPORT to the Government the facts of any case in which: (a) competitive tenders were NOT INVITED though they should have been under the rules; (b) a tender OTHER THAN THE LOWEST was accepted WITHOUT SUFFICIENT JUSTIFICATION; OR (c) any other MATERIAL IRREGULARITY was committed in connection with the contract.
